evidence_items.summary: Official ASUS RT-AX86U Pro support download page lists ASUS Firmware Restoration under the model-specific Driver & Tools area and describes it as a utility for failed firmware upgrade recovery.
evidence_items.limitations: This proves model-specific availability of the ASUS Firmware Restoration utility, but does not prove TFTP direction, recovery IP, post-upload behavior, or success semantics.

evidence_items.summary: Official ASUS Rescue Mode FAQ describes Firmware Restoration, static client IP 192.168.1.10/24, reset-held power-on, slow flashing power LED, firmware upload, reboot wait, and restoring DHCP after rescue mode.
evidence_items.limitations: The FAQ uses RT-AC68U as an example and is brand-level guidance; it does not establish RT-AX86U Pro-specific TFTP direction or post-upload behavior.
